prompt: Ultra-realistic iPhone mirror selfie of a young woman seated casually on a gray modern sofa in a warm, softly lit indoor living room. Mid-body vertical composition with a waist-up focus; only the top of the soft beige drawstring shorts is visible and the legs are cropped out. She holds a silver triple-camera iPhone in her right hand at chest-to-face level, angled slightly outward, partially covering the side of her face. Her head is turned slightly toward the phone in a natural candid selfie pose, with relaxed shoulders and a soft profile. She wears a fitted white ribbed half-sleeve crew-neck top and soft beige lounge shorts. Her dark brown hair is tied back in a high ponytail, with loose face-framing strands and natural texture. Add small gold hoop earrings, a delicate gold necklace with a tiny pendant, and a thin gold bracelet. The face should be intentionally obscured by a centered opaque square color block over the face, while preserving realistic skin tone on the neck and body. Background: a wooden-framed mirror with a vertical wooden divider behind her, gray sofa cushions, warm lamp glow from the left, neutral plaster wall, a white picture frame and a black framed photo on the right. Use warm cinematic indoor color grading, subtle shadows, natural skin texture, slight mirror reflection imperfections, shallow depth of field, faint iPhone front-camera grain, realistic proportions, casual social-media selfie aesthetic, no over-smoothing, no glamour studio lighting.
